summary: The video shows a rural road with a single lane in each direction. The road is bordered by trees and fencing. A cow appears on the right side of the road, moving across it. The vehicle approaches the cow cautiously.

events_timeline.event: Cow crosses the road while the vehicle drives past it.

uncertainties: Cow's full body is not visible in all frames.

risk_assessment.why: There is no collision or significant disruption in the road.
